TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Apapuro ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taitung, kwara sali buwan nya ga 286 buwan, 864 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 437 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 427 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 43%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Apapuro hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Apapuro hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Apapuro hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay mkraya' na Apapuro hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Apapuro hya' ga Alapanay. tay 'llaw na Apapuro hya' ga Matang. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Apapuro ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Apapuro ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ apapuro ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taituŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa alapanaj. taj ʔllaw na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa mataŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ apapuro ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ apapuro ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Apapuro ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taitung, kwara sali buwan nya ga 286 buwan, 864 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 437 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 427 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 43%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Apapuro hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Apapuro hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Apapuro hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay mkraya' na Apapuro hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Apapuro hya' ga Alapanay. tay 'llaw na Apapuro hya' ga Matang. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Apapuro ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Apapuro ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ apapuro ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taituŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa alapanaj. taj ʔllaw na apapuro ħjaʔ ɣa mataŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ apapuro ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ apapuro ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
